opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: His scalp is covered in these thick, yellow crusts that smell awful, and now behind his ears is bright red, weeping, and bleeding because he keeps rubbing it on the sheets.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe thick greasy scalp scaling spreading, now weeping and bleeding behind the ears; the baby is very irritable.

symptom_narrative.onset: mild thick greasy scalp scaling 4 weeks ago; spread and weeping over 48h
symptom_narrative.character: thick greasy yellow crusts on the scalp; red weeping skin behind the ears
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: very irritable, rubbing head, feeding poorly, not sleeping
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: scalp, forehead, eyebrows, sides of the nose, behind both ears
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: weeping/pinpoint bleeding behind the ears from rubbing; smelly crusts; no fever/vomiting
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: greasy scalp scaling from early on

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: greasy scalp scaling (crusts) since a few weeks old

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: olive/coconut oil applied to the scalp by parents

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: parents applying thick occlusive oils to the scalp

communication_style.typical_message_style: anxious parents fearing a serious infection

objective_data_offered.value: thick greasy yellow-brown crust on the top of the scalp; greasy yellow scaly red patches on the forehead/eyebrows/sides of the nose; red weeping macerated skin behind both ears with a tiny fissure bleeding a little
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: parent's description/camera; cannot palpate or assess for deep infection
